title: Not Enough Potatoes
description: Adds Potato Armor that improves as you eat Potatoes
body:
# Not Enough Potatoes ## Potato Armor Potato Armor tracks potatoes eaten, improving its protection.
Recipes
## Potato Shard Potato Shard let's any armor in the game track potatoes eaten, gaining extra armor. Right Click to apply it to one of the equipped armor items.
Recipe

### Automation Use a dispenser armed with potatoes (baked and poisonous work as well) on an armor stand wearing valid armor or just stand before it yourself. ### Armor Increase Formula | Armor | Extra Protection | | -------- | -------- | | Potato armor | _7/3 * ln(x)_ | | Other | _7/3 * ln(x) / ln(6)_ | (x is the number of potatoes consumed) The base of the logarithm used in the calculation (_e_ and _6_ by default) is configurable
